content.en:
Void Source Palace, Origin Space.

Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate, fusing the physical body tribulation realm with the soul tribulation realm.

The Body Tribulation Realm and the Soul Tribulation Realm are not fused at once, and then they can be promoted to a first-class invincible.

Ye Tian is the Nine Tribulation Realm of the Flesh Body and the Nine Tribulation Realm of the Soul, so he needs to fuse nine times, one Tribulation Realm at a time.

When the degree of integration of the body and soul reaches the level of a tribulation realm, there will be a fusion tribulation, after all, the soul tribulation realm and the physical body tribulation realm are also against the rules, and they naturally have to bear the calamity, without enough background, if they dare to forcibly fuse, they will definitely fall.

Because of insufficient accumulation, a second-class invincible with insufficient background is impossible to be promoted to a first-class invincible.

Years passed, and after consuming a lot of resources, Ye Tian finally fused the Flesh Tribulation Realm and the Soul Tribulation Realm to the extent of a catastrophe.

It was also at this time that he ushered in his first fusion tribulation.

Bang!!!

Endless flames, thunder, and wind blades enveloped every particle of Ye Tian's body, trying to annihilate his entire body.

However, Ye Tian's body was indestructible, even any particle was difficult to be wiped out, and the first fusion tribulation could not hurt Ye Tian at all.

Soon, the first fusion tribulation passed.

It's a good start!

Basically, after surviving a fusion tribulation, Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot, but he is no longer a second-class invincible, but he has not reached the realm of a first-class invincible.

This realm is equivalent to a half-step first-class invincible, and it is almost inevitable that you can become a first-class invincible, it is only a matter of time.

The fusion process is irreversible, that is to say, Ye Tian must complete the fusion, otherwise if the delay is too long, the body and soul will conflict, resulting in the inability to exert one's strength.

Because of this, when a second-class invincible hits a first-class invincible, they will choose to retreat in a safe place for countless years, and the moment they get out of the customs is the time to break through to a first-class invincible.

Time passed one after another, and Ye Tian also completed the fusion tribulation again and again.

The Ninth Fusion Tribulation was the most difficult, and Ye Tian's body and soul were too powerful, so his Ninth Fusion Tribulation was also many times more terrifying than the Ninth Fusion Tribulation of the other second-rank invincibles.

During the ninth fusion tribulation, Ye Tian was indeed injured, but only slightly.

In the end, he survived the ninth fusion tribulation.

......

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian felt the transformation of his body, at this moment his body and soul were fused together, each particle was both a physical particle and a soul particle, it was such a special state.

There are almost no shortcomings of a first-class invincible, if it is a second-class invincible, if the enemy casts a soul attack, if the attack power is too strong, it can also annihilate the soul of the second-class invincible at once.

But when it comes to the first-class invincible, the body is the soul, the soul is the body, the two are one, whether it is the body or the soul, there is no shortcoming, and it is very difficult to kill the other party in seconds.

Moreover, the casual blows of the first-class invincible contain both soul attacks and physical attacks.

At this time, Ye Tian had broken through to the realm of a first-class invincible, and his strength was probably comparable to a supreme person like the Heavenly Wind Source God.

As for ordinary supremes, he could inflict heavy blows on them with the wave of his hand.

At this moment, Ye Tian felt that he was no longer a weak person in the entire Source Sea, and he had the qualifications to talk to other top existences.

--------------------

Tianlin Realm.

Ye Jinpeng has been here for many years, and under Ye Tian's introduction, he also joined Tianfeng Hai, after all, at the beginning, there was a Yongming-level force as a backer, which was indeed much safer.

Now, Ye Jinpeng has already thoroughly refined the Eternal Soul Wood Origin in his soul, his soul talent is very high, and his physical talent is not bad, so he has broken through to the realm of a third-class invincible person at this time.

The next step was to elevate the Flesh Tribulation Realm to the second-rank invincible, but this step would take a long time.

After all, he didn't have such an opportunity as Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body came to the Tianlin Realm and summoned his junior Ye Jinpeng.

"Ancestor summoned me?"

Ye Jinpeng immediately passed.

Soon, he met Old Ancestor Ye Tian.

"Jinpeng meets the ancestor!"

Ye Jinpeng said respectfully.

"Very good, all of them are in the realm of third-class invincibles!" Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

"Compared to the Ancestor, I'm still far behind!" Ye Jinpeng said modestly.

Ye Tian smiled slightly and asked, "Jin Peng, do you want to become a child of the void?"

"Think!" Ye Jinpeng nodded again and again, but immediately said in frustration: "I know that the ancestor is the son of the void, and I also want to become the son of the void, and I also went to the Void Source Hall with a few friends before, and entered the first layer of the Void Tower, but the result was a fiasco, and it is too difficult to become the son of the void!"

"Let's go, I'll take you to the Void Source Palace!"

Ye Tian grabbed Ye Jinpeng with one hand, and instantly crossed the infinite distance and came to the Void Source Hall.

Ye Jinpeng had been to the Void Source Hall once, so he was no stranger to this place.

"Ancestor, what are you bringing me here for, even if I go to participate in the assessment of the first layer of the Void Tower, I won't be able to pass it!" Ye Jinpeng wondered.

"Machine Spirit, come out!"

Ye Tian ordered.

Wow!

The machine spirit appeared and said respectfully, "Master!"

"Arrange for this junior to become a child of the void!" Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes!"

The machine spirit responded.

Immediately, the machine spirit made Ye Jinpeng a son of the void, and rewarded the son of the void to Ye Jinpeng, without any difference from the treatment of other sons of the void.

It wasn't until he really became the son of the void that Ye Jinpeng woke up from his confusion.

"Ancestor, what's going on?"

Ye Jinpeng was shocked.

The ancestor's words made him a child of the void?

He also knows a lot of sons, those eternal name-level forces don't have a few children of the void, and it will only take a long time to occasionally give birth to a son of the void, which shows how high the status of the son of the void is.

"Because the Void Source Hall is mine, I am the master of the Void Source Hall!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

He is not afraid of being exposed now, his body is in the Void Source Palace, and his own strength is comparable to the Supreme, even if he is a Supreme at the level of the Void Source Ancestor, there is no way to kill him in the Void Source Hall across a forbidden place.

Therefore, he will hardly fall, what are you afraid of?

"What, the Ancestor is the master of the Void Source Palace!!!"

Ye Jinpeng was really dumbfounded.
